data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Implements streamlined decision-making by limiting the number of options presented to users.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design principles, user journey mapping

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs user interfaces that allow for easy navigation and accessibility of elements.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design, CTA buttons size optimization

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Applies grouping, alignment, and continuity to create a visually organized interface.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits cognitive load by presenting information in manageable chunks to improve user recall and retention.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Designs based on user familiarity and common web patterns to reduce the learning curve.
